title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BikeDekho Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at BikeDekho Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Digital Marketing Manager looking for your next big career move? BikeDekho Advisory Limited in Gwalior offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About BikeDekho Advisory Limited:
BikeDekho Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BikeDekho Advisory Limited!
